title: Can I update my product?
bodyHtml:
No, unfortunately you can't do it by yourself. Remember that a product page is shared between all the sellers who put a listing on it, therefore you can't modify the attribute/title or description of an existing product. 

But in case of a modification request: In order to ease the product modification process, whose responsibility is upon Catalog Team, the request should be addressed by filling out this form through the Seller Support Center.

Our Catalog team will provide you a technical assistance concerning your request. 

Please make sure to provide: 

  • Product name + Back Market ID
  • SKU and Seller's name
  • Details of the problem ( The wrong information and the update suggested )
